title: Check your email
subtitle: Activate your HiveSpace account before your first sign-in.

messages.verificationSent: We sent a verification link to your email address.
messages.error: Verification email could not be sent
messages.cooldownActive: Please wait before requesting another verification email.
messages.pendingVerificationRequired: Your account is still pending email verification. Request a fresh verification email and complete the link in your inbox before signing in.
messages.verificationRecovery: That verification link could not be completed. Request a new verification email to continue.
messages.duplicatePendingAccount: This email already has a pending account. Request another verification email to continue.

errors.validationFailed: Check your information and try again.

help.checkInbox: Open your inbox and spam folder for the latest message.
help.clickLink: Use the link in that email to activate your account.
help.resendInfo: Need another email? You can request a new one after {seconds} seconds.
